name: Dynavap - Titanium Tip: Halo
summary: Dynavap - Titanium Tip: Halo — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The DynaVap Halo Titanium Tip is a precision-engineered component designed to deliver cooler vapour, balanced heat distribution, and reliable performance across a wide range of DynaVap setups. Built from medical-grade titanium, the Halo Tip features a refined multi-finned geometry that helps reduce heat transfer toward the stem while promoting even extraction throughout the chamber. Please note: the Halo Tip is designed for use with standard DynaVap Caps and fits all standard DynaVap stems. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
